title: FURNACE CLIENT
description: Supercharges your Minecraft experience with blazing-fast FPS
body:
**FURNACE CLIENT** is a Minecraft modpack designed to significantly enhance FPS (Frames Per Second) performance while providing various additional features and improvements to the game. Here's a breakdown of the mods included in the pack and their purposes:

1. **Continuity** - Enhances connected textures in Fabric.
2. **Xaero's Minimap** - Adds a minimap to the game for easier navigation.
3. **YetAnotherConfigLib** - A library mod that provides configuration capabilities for other mods.
4. **Shulker Box Tooltip** - Displays the contents of a Shulker Box when hovering over it in the inventory, improving inventory management.
5. **ToolTipFix** - Fixes tooltip-related bugs and improves tooltip functionality.
6. **MoreCosmetics** - Adds more cosmetic options to the game for customization.
7. **Litematica Printer** - Provides advanced building tools and schematic support.
8. **[EMF] Entity Model Features** - Enhances entity modeling capabilities.
9. **More Culling** - Improves rendering performance by culling unnecessary entities.
10. **ImmediatelyFast** - Optimizes game performance for faster rendering.
11. **Clean F3** - Cleans up the debug screen for better visibility.
12. **No Resource Pack Warnings** - Disables resource pack-related warnings for a smoother gameplay experience.
13. **Simply No Shading** - Removes shading effects for performance improvement.
14. **Cloth Config API** - A library mod that provides configuration capabilities for other mods.
15. **Sodium** - A performance-focused rendering engine that improves FPS significantly.
16. **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** - Enhances entity texture rendering capabilities.
17. **Unique Dark** - Adds a unique dark theme to the game for aesthetic purposes.
18. **Reese's Sodium Options** - Provides additional customization options for Sodium.
19. **Exordium** - Puts limits to GUI and HUD FPS.
20. **AppleSkin** - Adds information about food saturation and health regeneration.
21. **Better Bed Messages** - Improves the display of messages related to beds.
22. **MaLiLib** - A library mod that provides various utilities for other mods.
23. **Perspective Mod Redux** - Adds customizable camera perspectives for improved gameplay experience.
24. **Starlight (Fabric)** - Provides lighting optimizations for better performance.
25. **Fabric Language Kotlin** - Adds Kotlin language support for mod development.
26. **Too Many Players** - Improves performance when many players are present.
27. **Noxesium** - Provides performance optimizations for smoother gameplay.
28. **Dynamic FPS** - Dynamically adjusts FPS for better performance.
29. **Not Enough Animations** - Adds missing animations to the game for a more immersive experience.
30. **Better Ping Display [Fabric]** - Improves the display of ping information.
31. **Blur (Fabric)** - Adds blur effects for aesthetic purposes.
32. **Entity Culling** - Optimizes entity rendering for improved performance.
33. **Memory Leak Fix** - Fixes memory leaks for a more stable gameplay experience.
34. **ReplayMod** - Adds replay functionality for recording and playback.
35. **Custom Block Overlay** - Adds customizable block overlays for improved visuals.
36. **Enhanced Block Entities** - Enhances block entity rendering for better performance.
37. **Indium** - Provides various optimizations and improvements.
38. **Fabric API** - A core mod required for many other Fabric mods to function.
39. **Sodium Extra** - Adds additional performance optimizations for Sodium.
40. **No Fog** - Removes fog effects for improved visibility.
41. **Debugify** - Adds debugging features for mod developers.
42. **Resourcify** - Adds resource management features for mod developers.
43. **Get It Together, Drops!** - Improves item drop mechanics for better performance.
44. **Carpet** - Adds various gameplay enhancements and optimizations.
45. **Iris/Oculus & GeckoLib Compat** - Provides compatibility for other mods.
46. **Chat Heads** - Adds chat heads for players for easier communication.
47. **Clumps** - Optimizes item grouping for improved performance.
48. **Iris Shaders** - Adds shader support for improved visuals.
49. **Packet Fixer** - Fixes packet-related issues for a smoother gameplay experience.
50. **MidnightLib** - Adds various utilities and optimizations for mod development.
51. **In-Game Account Switcher** - Allows players to switch between accounts in-game.
52. **Fast Better Grass** - Improves the rendering of grass for better performance.
53. **Krypton** - Provides encryption for network packets.
54. **Satin API** - A library mod that provides various utilities for other mods.
55. **Motion Blur** - Adds motion blur effects for visual enhancement.
56. **Lithium** - Provides various optimizations for server performance.
57. **Better Beds** - Adds functionality to beds for a more immersive experience.
58. **Wavey Capes** - Adds wave-like animations to capes for visual enhancement.
59. **CIT Resewn JSONLagPatch** - Fixes lag-related issues with custom item textures.
60. **Architectury API** - A core mod required for many other Fabric mods to function.
61. **Mod Menu** - Adds a mod menu for easier mod management.
62. **ModernFix** - Provides various fixes and optimizations for modern gameplay.
63. **Custom Crosshair Mod** - Adds customizable crosshairs for improved aiming.
64. **Forge Config API Port** - Ported Forge API for configuration.
65. **Clear Vision Plus** - Improves visibility for a clearer view.
66. **YDM's Weapon Master** - Adds a variety of weapons for enhanced gameplay.
67. **Eating Animation** - Adds animation to eating for a more immersive experience.
68. **Language Reload** - Reloads language files for better compatibility.
69. **FerriteCore** - Adds core functionalities and optimizations.
70. **ThreadTweak** - Optimizes thread management for improved performance.
71. **Zoomify** - Adds zoom functionality for a closer look.
72. **Gamma Utils (Fullbright)** - Adds fullbright functionality for better visibility.
73. **Very Many Players (Fabric)** - Adds support for a large number of players.
74. **LambDynamicLights** - Adds dynamic lighting effects for improved visuals.
75. **Immersive Portals** - Adds immersive portal effects for a more realistic experience.
76. **3D Skin Layers** - Adds 3D skin layers for more detailed player models.

**Why Download FURNACE CLIENT?**
FURNACE CLIENT offers a comprehensive collection of mods that not only enhance FPS performance but also provide a wide range of additional features and improvements to make your Minecraft experience more enjoyable and immersive. Whether you're looking for better performance, enhanced visuals, or new gameplay mechanics, FURNACE CLIENT has you covered. Download it now and take your Minecraft experience to the next level!
